ns0:entry.ns0:title: 0Chencc/clawgod
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/0Chencc/clawgod
Language: html
This is NOT a third-party Claude Code client. ClawGod is a runtime patch applied on top of the official Claude Code. It works with any version — as Claude Code updates, the patch continues to take effect

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DigitalPlatDev/FreeDomain
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DigitalPlatDev/FreeDomain
Language: html
DigitalPlat FreeDomain: Free Domain For Everyone

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DynamoDS/Dynamo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DynamoDS/Dynamo
Language: html
Open Source Graphical Programming for Computational Design and Automation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Unstructured-IO/unstructured
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Unstructured-IO/unstructured
Language: html
Convert documents to structured data effortlessly. Unstructured is open-source ETL solution for transforming complex documents into clean, structured formats for language models. Visit our website to learn more about our enterprise grade Platform product for production grade workflows, partitioning, enrichments, chunking and embedding.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: akiralereal/iptv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/akiralereal/iptv
Language: html
基于 Docker 的 IPTV 直播源管理与分发系统：可视化后台、咪咕源抓取（含体育赛事/EPG），支持外部源管理与 m3u txt 订阅；内置纬来体育、Red Bull、4K 卫视及港澳台等，开箱即用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: evolution-foundation/evo-crm-community
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evolution-foundation/evo-crm-community
Language: html
Open source and self-hosted AI-powered customer service platform. Single-tenant, no multi-account, no per-user charges — you run the complete stack on your server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hmislk/hmis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hmislk/hmis
Language: html
This is an Open Source Java EE based Hospital Information Management System

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hotheadhacker/awesome-selfhost-docker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hotheadhacker/awesome-selfhost-docker
Language: html
🚀 Curated list of open-source, self-hosted projects deployable with Docker and docker-compose. Your go-to resource for amazing self-hostable software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectcontour/contour
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectcontour/contour
Language: html
Contour is a Kubernetes ingress controller using Envoy proxy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rdkit/rdkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rdkit/rdkit
Language: html
The official sources for the RDKit library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rezarahiminia/worldcup2026
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rezarahiminia/worldcup2026
Language: html
Grab your football API data for FIFA World Cup 2026 competition!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ykdojo/claude-code-tips
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ykdojo/claude-code-tips
Language: html
43 tips for getting the most out of Claude Code, from basics to advanced - includes a custom status line script and Claude Code running itself in a container. Also includes the dx plugin.
